mapper.sql: lr.id, lr.user_id, lr.type, lr.start_date, lr.end_date, lr.reason, lr.status, lr.approver_id, lr.approver_comment, lr.approved_at, lr.created_at, u.name AS user_name, u.department, a.name AS approver_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM leave_requests lr LEFT JOIN employees u ON u.id = lr.user_id LEFT JOIN employees a ON a.id = lr.approver_id WHERE lr.id = #{id} AND lr.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leave_requests WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'pending' AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leave_requests WHERE status = 'pending' AND deleted_at IS NULL
